name: Propell Credit Union
description_short: Federal credit union specializing in small business banking with personal accounts, offering up to $500K deposit insurance, competitive rates, and business-focused financial services.
description_long: Propell Credit Union is a federally-insured credit union that positions itself as "the only credit union designed for small businesses." Originally established as a neighborhood credit union for personal banking, it has evolved to serve both entrepreneurs and individual members seeking alternative banking solutions with a community-oriented approach. Propell offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including business loans (SBA and USDA), business deposits, merchant services, payroll processing, retirement planning, and workers compensation services. For personal banking, they provide iSAVE high-yield savings accounts (up to 3.25% APY), checking accounts, money market accounts, credit cards (11.49% APR), and mortgage refinancing services. The credit union also offers tax filing services at a flat $39 rate with no add-ons. What distinguishes Propell is its dual focus on small business and personal members, combined with enhanced deposit protection through Excess Share Insurance providing an additional $250,000 coverage beyond the standard NCUA $250,000 limit for a total of $500,000. Their CEO maintains a direct contact channel (CEOCorner@propellcu.org), emphasizing a relationship-based rather than transaction-based approach. The PropellGO mobile and online banking app provides real-time account management, and they operate a Propell Kids Foundation supporting at-risk youth. The company demonstrates strong member satisfaction based on available testimonials, though as a credit union, membership eligibility may apply. Rate competitiveness and product breadth position them well for small business owners seeking personalized service, though specific APRs for various loan products beyond the highlighted 11.49% and SmartRefi rate are not detailed on their homepage.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Up to $500,000 in total deposit insurance coverage through combination of NCUA ($250K) and Excess Share Insurance ($250K)
High-yield iSAVE savings accounts offering up to 3.25% APY with no fees and no fixed term
Specialized small business focus with SBA/USDA loans, merchant services, payroll processing, and business credit lines
Low credit card APR of 11.49% with no balance transfer fees and no annual fees
Comprehensive suite including tax filing ($39 flat rate), retirement planning, and workers compensation services
Mobile and online banking (PropellGO) with real-time account control
Direct CEO contact channel and emphasis on personalized member relationships rather than transactional banking
cons: Limited transparency on homepage regarding specific membership eligibility requirements or how to become a member
Loan product details sparse on homepage—only SmartRefi (11.49%) and Business Line of Credit rates prominently featured; other loan APRs not clearly disclosed
As a credit union, may have geographic or occupational membership restrictions not detailed on primary website content
Tax filing service ($39) and some ancillary offerings suggest revenue diversification that may not be core competencies
No information provided on funding speed, application process timelines, or customer service availability hours
best_for: Small business owners seeking personalized financing, business deposits, and integrated payroll/merchant services
Savers prioritizing high-yield accounts and enhanced deposit insurance protection beyond standard FDIC/NCUA limits
Individuals and families seeking alternative banking with relationship-based service and community focus
Self-employed professionals and entrepreneurs needing SBA/USDA loan access with business-focused advisory support
diagnosis: Propell Credit Union is best for small business owners seeking integrated financing and banking solutions with personalized service, or individuals prioritizing high-yield savings with enhanced deposit protection. Primary caveat: membership eligibility requirements are not transparent on their homepage, and specific APRs/terms for most loan products beyond their headline rates require direct inquiry.
services: iSAVE high-yield savings accounts (up to 3.25% APY)
Credit cards (11.49% APR, no annual fees, $300-$35,000 credit lines)
Business real estate secured lines of credit
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Federal credit union specializing in small business banking with personal accounts and $500K deposit insurance.
